content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES Co1nssIoN
P.O. Box 807
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660
Fax (916) 322-0886
July 29, 1999
Harold R. Wolgamott
City of Gonzales
Post Office Box 717
Gonzales, California 93926
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-99-196
Dear Mr. Wolgamott:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the “Act”).’
I am attaching a fact sheet which should answer your questions regarding whether you
have a conflict of interest due to your position on the city council and your position as a
firefighter. If after reading the enclosed fact sheet you still have questions, please do not hesitate
to contact me.
Sincerely,
Steven G. Churchwell
General Counsel
By:
ynda Doherty
Political Reform Consultant, Legal Division
SGC:LD:tls
Enclosure
Government Code sections 81000
- 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109
-
18995, of the California Code of Regulations.

sections.question_synthetic: Whether Harold R. Wolgamott has a conflict of interest under the Political Reform Act due to his simultaneous positions on the city council and as a firefighter.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC provided an attached fact sheet to address the conflict of interest question regarding simultaneous service as a city council member and firefighter, with an invitation for follow-up questions.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: No verbatim QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections found in document text; substantive response provided via enclosure (fact sheet) rather than inline explanation. Document is a brief cover letter referencing attached materials.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether Harold R. Wolgamott has a conflict of interest under the Political Reform Act due to his simultaneous positions on the city council and as a firefighter.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC provided an attached fact sheet to address the conflict of interest question regarding simultaneous service as a city council member and firefighter, with an invitation for follow-up questions.

embedding.summary: The FPPC responds to Harold R. Wolgamott's request for advice regarding potential conflicts of interest between his positions as a city council member and firefighter, providing a fact sheet for guidance.
